exercises.title: Four Quadrants Service Assessment
exercises.summary: Plot current and prospective services across the four quadrants to see where the firm sits today and where advisory growth lies. Used in-session (Tabs 1-2) with Tabs 3-5 as pre-Session-2 homework.

exercises.title: 52-Card Team Pickup
exercises.summary: Team-building card exercise: sort responsibilities across the four roles (BOS / Admin / Analyst / Technical) to expose gaps and frame the next hire.

exercises.title: Client Portfolio Evaluation
exercises.summary: Map clients on a value-vs-effort matrix and assign Gold / Silver / Bronze / Fire tiers to guide who to grow, hold, or fire.

exercises.title: Tech Stack Cost Calculator
exercises.summary: Build an advisory tech stack for the Regional Distribution Co. case across seven app categories with 2026-verified pricing; live total and benchmark.

exercises.title: AI Vendor Due-Diligence Scorecard
exercises.summary: Score one AI tool across six areas (three critical) before client data is involved; auto Go / Conditional / No-Go verdict, any critical Red forces No-Go.
